title: Ordered List (1 items)
content: 7. Thematic Environments &amp Historical Immersion Text modals undermine immersion; visuals must reflect each era fully. Expansion Proposals • Visual theme selector showcasing a thumbnail of each era. • Five core eras packaged with scene.json, assets, ruleset.js, lore.md. Era Setting Unique Mechanics &amp Assets Roman Villa (150 AD) Marble courtyard with fountain audio Bone checkers, white marble board Byzantine Court (900 AD) Candle-lit hall with mosaic floors Gilded board, chant soundscape Viking Longhouse (1000 AD) Fire-lit Great Hall with central pit Wood/horn pieces, wind &amp crackling fire Tang Dynasty China (700 AD) Scholar’s study with calligraphy scrolls Feng shui dice physics, ink UI accents Edo Japan (1600 AD) Tatami room with shoji screens Ink-brush animations, minimalist interface • Dynamic day/night cycles that shift lighting and ambient audio. • Hidden lore scrolls unlocking mini-lessons and cosmetic upgrades. --- 8. Educational Journey in 3D Animated 2D tutorials feel detached in a 3D world; learning must live on the board. Expansion Proposals • Timewalk Onboarding: Fly-through of era before gameplay, narrated by the Archivist. • In-World Tutorial:• Scene-anchored
